skill1.kitLine: Activates after 5 normal attack(s). Affects all allies. Roar: Critical Rate ▲ 2.62%, stacks up to 5 time(s) and lasts for 5 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[0]: trigger hitCount count:50, target allies, buff critRatePct 2.62 / durationSec 5 / maxStacks 5
skill1.note: count:50 = 5 pulls × hitsPerShot 10 (engine adds hitsPerShot per pull, sim.ts:1727). Stack ratcheting + shared-expiry refresh is engine-computed from her cadence (applyBuff sim.ts:900-910); no haircut baked. Cadence-sensitivity folded into ⚑1.

skill1.kitLine: Activates after 15 normal attack(s). Affects all allies with a Shotgun. Maximum Effective Range ▲ 20% for 10 sec.
skill1.note: No effective-range StatKey exists; range bonus universally force-OFF in engine; SG pellet landing is the fixed measured SG_LANDING_BY_BAND table with no range-buff hook. Real under-model (⚑5): should raise far-band landing, changes landing not shots fired (hard-rule-1 OK).

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies. Hit Rate ▲ 20.28% for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[0]: trigger fullBurstEnter, target allies, buff hitRatePct 20.28 / durationSec 10
skill2.note: Recorded but ENGINE-INERT (100% accuracy assumed). Kept per HARD RULE 4 — Hit Rate provably raises core-hit rate, magnitude unmeasured (⚑2), never deleted.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects 2 ally unit(s) with the highest final ATK and a Shotgun. Number of pellets ▲ 5 for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1]: trigger fullBurstEnter, target alliesOfWeapon SG, buff normalAttackPct 50 / durationSec 10
skill2.note: +5 pellets on base-10 SG spread = +50% normal (arcana-fortune-mate precedent). TWO approximations (⚑3): top-2-ATK cap dropped (no top-ATK-with-weapon TargetDef) → applies to ALL SG allies incl. Leona herself, over-applies in 3+-SG teams; and +50% assumes extra 5 pellets land at same band fraction as base spread.

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Critical Damage ▲ 34.64% for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[0]: trigger burstCast, target allies, buff critDamagePct 34.64 / durationSec 10
burst.note: No activation clause → her own burst block on burstCast. Fires only on rotations Leona casts (B2).

burst.kitLine: Activates when Roar is at max stacks. Affects all allies with shotguns. Critical Rate ▲ 21.32% for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[1]: trigger burstCast, target alliesOfWeapon SG, buff critRatePct 21.32 / durationSec 10
burst.note: Target is an exact weapon-typed fit (no approximation). Roar-max-stacks gate NOT expressible (no buff-stack-count gate in Block) → modeled UNCONDITIONAL, assumed satisfied at cast (⚑4 — optimistic; reload-straddle stack resets mean gate may not reliably hold at solo cadence).

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: 'Maximum Effective Range ▲ 20%' to shotgun allies is not modeled — engine has no range stat, SG pellet landing is a fixed measured table; real effect (better far-band landing) is a known under-model.
documentedConfounds.why: Genuine unmodeled damage effect (⚑5): should raise SG-ally pellet landing at far bands → override under-predicts SG-team damage. Direction: under-model.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Hit Rate ▲ 20.28% is recorded but inert in the engine (100% accuracy assumed); in reality it raises the core-hit rate by an unmeasured amount.
documentedConfounds.why: ⚑2: block exists but does nothing in-engine; real kit adds core/landing rate during her FB window → under-predicts. Magnitude measured-only, currently zero.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: '+5 pellets' is modeled as Normal Attack +50% to ALL shotgun allies (kit: only the 2 highest-ATK shotgun allies) — over-applies in teams running 3 or more shotguns, including Leona herself.
documentedConfounds.why: ⚑3: bounded within-class over-application. In 3+-SG teams the buff reaches units the real kit excludes → over-predicts. Direction depends on team SG count; neutral in ≤2-SG teams.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: the 21.32% crit-rate line assumes Roar is fully stacked at her burst cast (the stack-count gate is not modeled and may not always hold).
documentedConfounds.why: ⚑4: gate modeled unconditionally (optimistic). If Roar <5 stacks at cast (e.g. post-reload reset) the 21.32% crit buff should NOT apply → over-predicts crit rate when gate fails.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑1 CADENCE TUPLE (pullsPerSec ~1.5 / reloadFrames 111 / rolling-reload) shipped unverified; Roar's engine-computed stack level AND the ⚑4 burst gate both inherit it. 9-round mag + 111f reload makes the across-reload trigger gap ~5.2s, marginally past the 5s Roar expiry → stacks can reset across reload straddles.
documentedConfounds.why: Steady-state Roar stack count is cadence-sensitive and drives both the S1 crit-rate ratchet and whether the ⚑4 burst gate holds. Wrong cadence → wrong stack level → gap in either direction.

authorIntentSummary: PARSER-BASELINE HYPOTHESIS (not yet measured/hand-tuned) for a PURE TEAM BUFFER: Supporter, combat ATK ~98k, no self-damage lines — all value is crit-rate/crit-dmg/hit-rate/pellet buffs to allies, so correctness is a /sim-battery board diff on SG teams, not a self-sim (no board data yet). Faithfully modeled: S1 Roar crit-rate stack (engine-computed cadence ratchet), S2 hit-rate (recorded but engine-inert), S2 +pellets as +50% normal to SG allies, burst crit-dmg to all + 21.32% crit to SG allies. Known-not-faithful: +pellets over-applies to ALL SG allies instead of top-2-ATK (⚑3), hit-rate does nothing in-engine (⚑2), the Roar-max burst gate is assumed unconditional (⚑4), and the S1 +20% effective-range line is unmodeled as a real far-band landing under-model (⚑5). Every ⚑ is an unmeasured estimate pending footage/focus-video recipes.
